speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As you're doing that, I need you to roll a deception check with advantage because you're helping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. Let's go. We go up to the front door. Where are y’all going?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to hang back. Is there a nook or an alley within view of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's alleys on each side, but they both have windows that are lit, so you would be in one of those vicinities.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we go half a block away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could. You would be at a distance though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's fine for the moment. For the moment, yeah. Get ready, we're going to do Mother's Love.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How will we know when to go?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to watch them at the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So the two of you enter. You go through the front door. It's a double door. It pushes open. It doesn't appear to have resistance, it's on a hinge. You push in, and at the front there's a clerk there, wearing the same white robe: a middle-aged man, receding hairline, short hair, big bulbous red nose, some pock-marking on his cheek. He looks up. "Can I help you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm fine. I'm perfectly, perfectly fine. I don't need to do any of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (coughing) No, you need help. It's real gross.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He reaches down and pulls a cloth up and puts it immediately over his face. "Okay, um-- "

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I don't -- I was born in a place like this. I don't want anything to -- I'm going to give myself a little (grunt). Sir, there's -- (vomit). I'm going to go for it right in his face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The ruckus is audible all the way down the block, so I turn myself into a half-orc woman and pick up Nott like my baby and put her head on my shoulder and start walking towards the building.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, the carpet peels back and it reveals beneath it a section of the wood that has a hinge bolted to one side of it. It's a square that's cut out of it, it looks like it's an open case. The carpet peels back, and then begins to fold back in its space, and then fold up again. It begins to slightly shift and rise, and the carpet almost seems to be gliding in the air on its own in the vicinity. It spins towards you and then rushes in your direction. I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right. The carpet seems magical to me, I wouldn't think that something under the carpet is magical.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep, I saw it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20! As they're having this conversation, you glance by the fireplace, the fire is crackling in there, and you glance down and right underneath the hearth, up where the fire's tickling, you see a piece of the stonework that doesn't match the others, it's slightly off-colored. It looks like the burning of the fire that's been given this dark and blackened look to it, there's one brick there that doesn't seem to have been affected by any of the soot at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I, avoiding the rug, lightly step over it, and see if I can jiggy the brick out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As your finger presses against the brick it slides in about a half an inch, and you hear this (click) sound over by where the metal large cabinet is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You just unlocked the fucking metal shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I see any change in the abjuration magic when she does that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does it go away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It vanishes. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Message. We are the fucking best! You can respond to this message! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I got to get that seal!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What you just did dispelled whatever ward was on the cabinet, however the carpet I can't tell exactly what's going on but there is something--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Use the Mage Hand to move the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Give me the papers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I cast Mage Hand and slowly peel back a corner of the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hand the two letters that we made for Lord Sutan.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yes, roll initiative, please. Beau, you're over by the fireplace so you've just seen that happen there, and I think that's--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You just unlocked the fucking metal shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I see any change in the abjuration magic when she does that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does it go away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It vanishes. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Message. We are the fucking best! You can respond to this message! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I got to get that seal!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What you just did dispelled whatever ward was on the cabinet, however the carpet I can't tell exactly what's going on but there is something--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Use the Mage Hand to move the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Give me the papers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I cast Mage Hand and slowly peel back a corner of the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hand the two letters that we made for Lord Sutan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the carpet peels back and it reveals beneath it a section of the wood that has a hinge bolted to one side of it. It's a square that's cut out of it, it looks like it's an open case. The carpet peels back, and then begins to fold back in its space, and then fold up again. It begins to slightly shift and rise, and the carpet almost seems to be gliding in the air on its own in the vicinity. It spins towards you and then rushes in your direction. I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're fighting a carpet! The fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're fighting a carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We had it coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's an animated object!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I had that in my one-shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My kids have fought a broom. This happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, look at that carpet!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That carpet is now gone, because instead you are fighting that carpet. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's like a cobra ready to strike!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, so Nott would've been over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we're rolling initiative, that's what we're doing?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You watch-- yeah. He goes and (boof)! She falls onto the ground and onto the landing of the spiral staircase. They both slide a moment. You watch as she goes, "What are you--" and he grabs and pulls that orange-ish bead that he had on his necklace and slams it into her mouth and holds it over. There's a moment of tension before-- (explosion) A flash of white, fiery, burning light explodes, a fireball sundering the interior of the staircase. You all have your ears ringing. The pain's there. The ones that are closest by would have been you, Caleb; I need you to roll a dexterity saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No-- I was going to say I cast Guiding Bolt at her, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's such a fast moment, if you didn't have anything prepared, it happens too quickly. You're like "ah!" and the bell rings. "You, stump sucker. I'll bleed over the extra years of your sentence into your wife's. That way you can both rot together on opposite sides of the dungeon." Ulog looks at you all like, absolute fury and sadness in his eyes. You see like tears down his cheek.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Oh, I had it! Shitballs!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hold Person?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I had it prepared, and that's what I wanted to cast. (fake sobs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes and takes the paper in his hand and puts it in your arm, Caleb, making eye contact with you, and goes, "Promise me you'll see her freed, friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I cast Hold Person on her!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On her?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, do it anyway!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Natural 20. She resists it. She goes, "What are you trying--" and Ulog goes, (roars) grabs towards his neck and runs, leaps off the stairs towards her and attempts to tackle her.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should take off while he does it.
